label: Tiles & Flooring

seo.title: Tiles & Flooring — Imported Porcelain Slabs for Ghana Projects
seo.description: Italian-grade porcelain slabs, marble-look stone, and large-format tiles for villa and premium apartment projects in Accra. Curated from Foshan.

hero.lead: From 1200×2700 mm Supreme Slabs to 90×180 cm warm-tone porcelain, every tile in this curation has been used on a real Decoropic site in Ghana. Sourced direct from Foshan factories, shipped through Tema port.

items.title: Source-direct from Foshan
items.body: We work with 1,000+ factories in the Pearl River Delta. No middleman markup.

items.title: Ghana-fit specs
items.body: All tiles tested for tropical humidity, salt air, and on-site cutting tools available in Accra.

items.title: Project-backed
items.body: Each selection has shipped to at least one Ghanaian villa we've delivered.

applications: Villa living room TV background wall — Castle Peak slab used as a full-height feature panel behind the media unit.
Main entrance lobby vertical feature — Royal Jade floor-to-ceiling cladding creates a gallery-like arrival moment.
Master bathroom full-height wet-area — Adria Stone 600×600 on walls and floor, continuous groutless look.

faq.question: What types of tiles do you supply for projects in Ghana?
faq.answer: We supply large-format porcelain slabs (1200×2700 mm), marble-look stone tiles, and 90×180 cm format tiles — sourced direct from Foshan factories and shipped to Tema port. Every SKU has been used on a real Decoropic project in Accra or Ghana.

faq.question: How are imported tiles priced for projects in Accra?
faq.answer: Pricing runs from $30/m² for standard porcelain to $120/m² for large-format Supreme Slabs, quoted FOB Foshan. Decoropic handles container shipping, customs clearance at Tema, and last-mile delivery to Accra. Request a quote with your floor plan for a project estimate.

faq.question: Can you supply enough tiles for a full villa in Ghana?
faq.answer: Yes — full-villa tile packages covering living areas, bedrooms, bathrooms, and outdoor terraces are our standard order size. We coordinate a single bill of materials, one container, and one shipment direct to your Accra or regional project site.
